rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE FINLEY VS. MITCHELL HUANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF CONSTANCE FINLEY Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Third Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Trial is continued to September 27, 2021. The Court notes that Karl Runft continues to incorrectly state under the penalty of perjury in December 10, 2020 Declaration that the trial is currently set for September 24, 2021. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reclassification To Unlimited Civil Case
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2020 line 10. PLAINTIFF THUY TIEN CAPITAL INC. rulings.Case Title: PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC VS. MARSHALL BLACKSHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2020 line 11. DEFENDANT MARSHALL BLACKSHER Motion For Leave To File Amended Answer is OFF CALENDAR. On December 11, 2020 Defendant was instructed to prepare and submit to the Court a code-compliant proposed answer (i.e. answer containing facts in support of affirmative defenses) no later than December 14, 2020. On December 14, 2020 Defendant lodge the same proposed Answer filed with the original motion verified on November 10, 2020. Defendant further filed a stipulation indicating Plaintiff's non-opposition to the filing of the Amended Answer. No explanation provided for failure to comply with the Court order directing a submission of a code-compliant proposed answer. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN HOGAN VS. MO LIAN CHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 17, 2020 line 12. DEFENDANT TO NHI TAT, MO CHAN DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained with final leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege all elements of tenancy at will and its proper termination. Allegations that no rent has been paid since 2018 are not sufficient. If Plaintiff is unsure at to defendant's status, unlawful detainer is not a proper action to ascertain the relationship and obligations between the parties. =(501/CFH)
